title: New Edition of “E-Discovery and Information Governance in Canada"
content:
## New Edition of “E-Discovery and Information Governance in Canada"
The increased volume of electronically stored information has become more essential in litigation and regulatory matters, causing organizations to re-evaluate how their data is managed and shining a spotlight on the importance of a proactive approach to e-Discovery and information governance.
Gain valuable insight into e-Discovery, organizational information governance, and the critical relationship between them in the new edition of "E-Discovery and Information Governance in Canada." Edited by MT>3's Susan Wortzman and Lauren Fishman, this helpful resource provides vital information for legal practitioners on Canada's unique e-Discovery issues, best practices and more.
To purchase the book, visit LexisNexis Canada Inc. at: https://bit.ly/3g1STIa
- Susan Wortzman Partner People.Offices.Singular Toronto
People.Offices.Singular Toronto
